description: Canonical 35-list Welsh spelling practice starter dataset.
notes: Original Spelio content structure designed for short adult spelling practice sessions.
Welsh answers store the intended correct written form. Mutated forms are treated as deliberate items, not loose alternatives.
Dialect is handled at word/item level. The session engine should filter eligible items before rendering letter slots.
Different-length dialect variants are separate word items linked by variantGroupId, not acceptedAlternatives.
acceptedAlternatives should only be used for same-slot spelling/format tolerances. Diacritic flexibility belongs in the spelling engine.
audioUrl is blank and audioStatus is missing for later Azure Voice generation.
